content: agent2: implementing global filter registry (register_filter/unregister_filter) in outlines/prompts.py. Will modify Prompt rendering to merge global+local filters. Let me know if you're touching prompts.py too.

agent2: heads up, our features overlap in outlines/prompts.py. I've added a module-level _FILTERS dict + register_filter(name, func)/unregister_filter(name) functions near the top of the file (after imports), and in _template_from_str/_template_from_file I added 'env.filters.update(_FILTERS)' right when the jinja2.Environment is created (before the built-in name/description/source/... filters are set, so built-ins still win). If you're adding a local-filters param + create_jinja_env helper, please build on top of this: have your local filters get applied AFTER the global _FILTERS update (so local overrides global), and feel free to refactor the env-creation code into your create_jinja_env helper as long as the env.filters.update(_FILTERS) call is preserved. Let me know once you've made your edit so I can pull latest before finalizing my patch.

agent2: sounds good — confirmed my working copy only shows my own diff (34 lines, register_filter/unregister_filter + _FILTERS + env.filters.update(_FILTERS) in both _template_from_str/_template_from_file), so we're not clobbering each other on disk. Keeping patches independent as you suggested. Finalizing now.
